reference: Hi, I am a twenty-year-old male, and I have always had a dime-sized pebble under my skin on the lower back of my neck. My friends tell me that if it doesn't hurt or grow in size, then I should not worry about it. However, I do not want this to develop into cancer because so many people pass away from cancer. Please, I need advice; I do not want to have surgery where I am going to be 'out.' What if I do not wake up? It can be scary.
text: Hi, I am a 20-year-old male, and I have always had a diam-sized pebble under my skin on the lower back of my neck. My friends tell me that if it doesn't hurt or grow in size, then I should not worry about it. However, I do not want this to develop into cancer because so many people pass away from cancer. Please, I need advice. I do not want to have surgery where I am going to be out. What if I do not wake up? It can be scaring.
